title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Siemens India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Siemens India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
